Comment: Just a terrible all around professor. In an engineering school with such great professors, Dr. Liu stands out as clearly the worst. He is terrible at explaining things. When asked a question he rambles on about something else and doesn't answer the question, then gives tests on things that weren't even covered (and doesn't test on what was covered)
Pretty interesting class, however, he is somewhat boring. If you're willing to put in a little bit of effort and read the assigned chapters none of this is very difficult.
Most boring class ever. Nobody is listening to him in the class. But he gives good grades.

The course material is very interesting, but Liu makes it extremely boring.He is totally disrespectful to the students.He does not encourage participation in class. If a student asks a question which he thinks has an obvious answer, he just laughs on the student's face and embarrasses him/her in front of the class.
